results.rendered_html:
anārogya a. [nāsti ārogyaṃ yasmāt na. ba.] Unwholesome, not conducive to good health, fatal to health; anāyuṣyamanārogyamasvargyaṃ cātibhojanaṃ  Ms. 2. 57. 
— gyaṃ Sickness, indisposition; ˚kara unhealthy, unwholesome.
